title: Curio Node Package Manifest (v3)
description: Schema for a Curio node-package manifest.json. A package ships in a directory named '<packageId>@<major>' containing this manifest, an optional README.md / LICENSE, an optional sources/ directory with one starter file per kind, and (after install) an integrity.json with SHA-256 hashes of every shipped file. The pre-installed 'curio.builtin' package ships with the app and provides the default 14 node kinds; third-party packages install via the warehouse drawer or by importing a `.curio.zip` archive.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema. Conventionally the raw GitHub URL of the schema file.

version.description: Semver-style version. Pre-release / build metadata accepted.

name.description: Human-readable package name shown in the warehouse drawer.

publisher.description: Human-readable publisher name shown alongside the package.

description.description: Short description shown in catalog cards.

license.description: SPDX-style license identifier (e.g. 'MIT'); null for unspecified.

readOnly.description: When true, this package cannot be overwritten via factory-install / Save-As. The package is omitted from the Save-As destination dropdown. Used by the built-in package and by curated organisation packages.

major.description: Major version of the package. The package's on-disk directory is '<id>@<major>'.

curioRuntime.description: Required Curio runtime range (informational; not enforced at install time yet).

permissions.description: Declared capability strings (e.g. 'filesystem.read'). Informational; not yet enforced.

dependencies.description: Other packages / Python / JS dependencies this package needs at install time.

lineage.description: Fork provenance. Present when this package was forked from another via the Node Factory.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 instant when the manifest was authored. Used as the canonical sort key in the catalog (newest first).

templates.description: Node templates this package defines. Each entry becomes a draggable node in the canvas palette.

id.description: Kebab-case template id. Canonical type at runtime is '<packageId>/<templateId>' (unversioned) or '<packageId>/<templateId>@<major>' (versioned).

label.description: Display name in the palette / canvas.

engine.description: Execution engine for the source code.

lifecycle.description: Key into the frontend lifecycleRegistry (e.g. 'code', 'vega', 'merge-flow'). See packages/curio.builtin@1/manifest.json for the canonical set.

iconRef.description: FontAwesome ref like 'fa-solid:upload' or 'fa-brands:python'. Resolved by the frontend iconRegistry.

paletteOrder.description: Sort key in the palette (lower = earlier). Omit to use the default 1000+offset (third-party packages sort after built-ins).

editor.description: Editor surface shown when the node is opened.

badge.description: Palette card badge label (e.g. 'VEGA', 'AUTK'). Omit for plain cards; third-party packages default to 'PACKAGE'.

source.description: Package-relative path to a single optional starter source file (e.g. 'sources/uhvi-load.py', 'sources/chart.vl.json'). Omit for structural kinds (built-in nodes ship no starter).

bidirectional.description: When true, the descriptor adds a third handle (`id: 'in/out'`, `position: top`) on top of the standard in/out pair so data can flow back through the node (used by visualization + pool kinds for interaction loops).

containerStyle.description: Overrides for the canvas node container's static layout. Most kinds use defaults; the merge-flow kind uses this to render as a narrow vertical rail.

hasProvenance.description: Whether the node exposes a provenance tab in its editor. Defaults to true; set to false to suppress (e.g. on display-only kinds).

tutorialId.description: Anchor id this kind exposes to the in-app tutorial system (`step-loading`, `step-vega`, ...).
